title: Krieg Tightens His Grip on the Baratie
description: On pages 9–12, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't compare us to other pirates you've crossed before!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: We're pirates of Don Krieg, the ruler of East Blue!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: (1) Bill LY WOOD

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Shit... These guys are strong...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're nothing like the other pirates that we've been able to beat before!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Are you gonna let them beat you that easily!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And you call yourselves fightsin' cooks!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So what if you're fighting cooks!? We fight for a living!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So just quietly hand this boat over to us!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: 10 years since I've been a cook! And 300 restaurants I've gone to!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: In every single one of'em, I'd get into fights and refuse to be hired! Those days were rough...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: After searching and searching, we finally came to this restaurant!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: here, whether it be fighting or cooking, we can do it as much we want!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: There ain't another place as good as this shop!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: As if we'd hand it over to you pirate scum!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Aghhhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What's up with these guys!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: This is the power of fightin' cooks of the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The hell are you guys doing...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hmm!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who's this guy...

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
